stories.title: Implement Query Analyzer
stories.description: Create a new module `src/analyzer.py` that uses Gemini with Structured Output to analyze a given JD/query. It should return a JSON object with boolean flags: `requires_hard_skills` and `requires_soft_skills`.

stories.title: Implement Balanced Retriever Pipeline
stories.description: Refactor RAG logic in `src/balancer.py` to route based on the analyzer. If both skills are needed, perform parallel parallel searches on ChromaDB with metadata filters (`test_type` containing 'Knowledge' for hard skills and 'Personality' for soft skills). Combine the top K results.

stories.title: Format Assessment Output Schema
stories.description: Adjust the completion chain to verify the final LLM payload formats the recommendations exactly as a list of dictionaries comprising `title` and the associated `Assessment_url`, preparing it for Phase 4 API consumption.
